message:
perf(doom): hoist base color f32 conversions and sky ceiling check (bd-3e1t.5.3)

Move base_r/g/b as-f32 conversions and front.is_sky_ceiling() string
comparison from per-column to per-seg scope, reducing redundant work
in the BSP renderer hot loop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
